verdict: An incredibly well-timed and rhythmic chart that captures the syncopation of the music beautifully, held back only by a highly repetitive jump pattern.

issues.problem: The chart uses 'JUMP UR' ten times consecutively for every major beat accent. This extreme repetition creates a heavy right-side bias; alternating with JUMP UL or other jump variations would improve physical balance and engagement.
A 16th-note transition between opposite outer panels (L to R) at 152 BPM (99ms gap) is extremely wide and physically awkward for a Medium difficulty chart.
